testcase.name: Agent Interaction › sends a message and displays the agent response
Agent Interaction › displays error message when agent call fails
Agent Interaction › clears chat messages when "Clear chat" is clicked
Nexus Agent App › loads the app and displays the console sidebar
Nexus Agent App › shows login status as "Logged out" by default
Nexus Agent App › displays the chat input with correct placeholder
Nexus Agent App › disables the Send button when input is empty
Nexus Agent App › enables the Send button when input has text
Nexus Agent App › opens settings sidebar when cogwheel is clicked
Nexus Agent App › shows the New Project button
Authentication Flow › shows logged out state by default
Authentication Flow › shows logged in state when tokens are in localStorage
Nexus Agent Chat Interface › should allow user to enter an agent prompt
Music Generation › generates music and shows audio player on success
Music Generation › displays error when agent returns an error event
Music Generation › audio preview element has controls attribute
Project Management › shows "New Project" button that is disabled when not logged in
Project Management › displays project list heading when projects section is present
Project Management › shows disconnect button text for connected projects
Settings › dark mode toggle sets data-theme attribute on document
Settings › LLM provider can be changed via dropdown
Settings › settings persist across page reload
